description: Establish ~/.gemini/AGENTS.md with global context, coding rules, and safety parameters.
Establish ~/.gemini/GEMINI.md with global subagent preferences and tool overrides.
Configure settings.json, mcp_config.json, and baseline rule templates for downstream projects.
Upgrade local AGENTS.md, GEMINI.md, and CONTEXT.md maps.
Implement .agents/hooks.json rules to block force pushes, root deletions, and enforce confirmation boundaries.
Create standard documentation including architecture, quality checklists, and beliefs decisions.
Establish features.json tracking and progress.md logging patterns.
Deliver a pyproject.toml package list and a dynamic init.sh environment compiler.
Implement upgrade-project.sh to push templates or pull local optimizations bidirectionally with diffs and safe placeholder mappings.
Added [tool.setuptools.packages.find] exclude list for scratch*, templates*, tests*, docs*. init.sh now passes with zero build errors.
Implement test_symlink_capability() in setup-harness.sh to detect if native directory symlinks can be created without admin privileges.

feature: Auto-elevated Developer Mode & Symlink Batch Writer
description: Implement create_symlinks_elevated() to generate a temporary .bat file modifying the Developer Mode registry key and executing symlinks, running it via PowerShell -Verb RunAs.
Refactor setup-harness.sh Section 5 to use a unified symlink pair list and orchestrate pathways (pre-flight success -> normal run, pre-flight fail -> elevated batch run, fallback to ln -s).
Extend test_harness_bootstrap.py with tests verifying setup-harness.sh under mocked Windows settings, covering capability success, capability failure with UAC elevation, and abort path.
Update ADR-0004/0005 to document the auto-elevation strategy and registry enablement, and update progress.md to record the zero-touch automated setup milestone.
Established strict agent rules preventing unmanaged global Python commands and refactored setup/bootstrapping scripts to consistently use uv run.
Migrated all rules and templates from hardcoded absolute file:/// URLs to standard relative paths, enabling complete device-agnostic portability and preventing git-dirty state.

feature: Research Gaps Closure and Infrastructure Template Enrichment
description: Enriched AGENTS.md rules with coding/data/modeling best practices. Deployed Makefile, pre-commit config, env.example, config.py, and conftest.py templates dynamically linked by package name.
Implemented cross-platform Python TUI statusline script with Gemini/Claude quota tracking and time until reset, establishing mathematically correct context token displays.
Cloned mattpocock/skills standard engineering and productivity skills to the monorepo harness and verified cross-platform offline copies.
Implemented setup-device.sh and setup-device.ps1 replacing legacy harness setup, performing settings.json patching and global configs deployment.
Added scaffold-project.sh and scaffold-project.ps1 delegating to modular scaffold.py to dynamically bootstrap canonical environments based on type.
Added upgrade-project.sh and upgrade-project.ps1 to verify project execution securely, never overwriting user files, auto-generating ADR backups, and updating AGENTS.md blocks.

feature: Global Skills Migration & DFP Execution Improvement
description: Migrated custom skills (to-dfp, execute-dfp) to templates/skills, establishing dynamic workspace resolution and continuous graph execution via Mermaid DFP.
Implement a system to archive old progress.md milestones to docs/archive/ to prevent token bloat and maintain agent reasoning performance.
Deploy default templates and hooks to ensure safety protocols, like secret scanning and safe defaults.

Wire scaffold.py to deploy all templates (pyproject.toml, Makefile, .pre-commit-config.yaml, progress.md, CONTEXT.md, features.json, .env.example, DEVELOPER_WORKFLOW.md, hooks.json, R templates) to downstream projects.
Add {{PACKAGE_NAME}} and {{PROJECT_GOAL_SUMMARY}} resolution to scaffold.py so pyproject.toml, conftest.py, and progress.md render correctly in downstream projects.
Create a Pydantic Settings config.py template under templates/python/src/{{project_name}}/ that conftest.py can import, with typed fields for RANDOM_SEED, TEST_SIZE, DATA_DIR, etc.
Copy a canonical .agents/hooks.json (credential blocking, force-push prevention, destructive op gates) into scaffolded and upgraded projects.
Create a reusable ADR format template (docs/adr/ADR-TEMPLATE.md) and a docs/research/README.md explaining the expected spike format.

feature: Reconcile Deleted Docs with Progress Claims
description: Audit and resolve stale progress.md milestone references to docs/architecture.md, docs/quality.md, docs/beliefs.md, docs/DATA_DICT.md, docs/MODEL_NOTES.md. Either recreate or mark as deprecated.
Create a .github/workflows/ci.yml template that runs uv sync, uv run pytest, ruff check, and mypy on push/PR for downstream projects.
Create a src/schemas.py template with example Pandera DataFrameSchema contracts to make the pandera dependency meaningful out of the box.
Add an integration test that scaffolds a project, resolves all placeholders, runs uv sync + uv run pytest, and verifies the downstream project boots green.
